description_long: This is a life-sized model of a large gull, featuring a robust body with predominantly white plumage on the head, neck, and underparts, and medium gray wings and back. The bird has a strong, slightly hooked yellow beak with a red spot near the tip, and striking yellow legs and webbed feet. Its eyes are pale with a distinct ring, and the wings are long and pointed, blending into a black-tipped tail. The overall feather pattern is clean and sharply defined, with a smooth transition between the white and gray areas. The bird stands upright, giving it a commanding presence typical of urban-dwelling gulls often seen near coastlines, parks, and city streets.
description: A large, white and gray gull with a yellow beak and legs, standing upright with pointed wings and a black-tipped tail.
description_view_0: Front view showing the bird's symmetrical white head, yellow beak, and both yellow webbed feet clearly.
description_view_1: Left side profile highlighting the bird's strong beak, pale eye, and the smooth transition from white to gray on the body and wings.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the bird's back, gray wings, and the black-tipped tail feathers, with both feet visible from behind.
description_view_3: Right side profile similar to the left, showing the beak, eye, and the full length of the body and tail.
attribute_plumage_pattern: Solid white head and underparts, medium gray wings and back, black-tipped tail, clean color boundaries.
